meaning: n.吃力的工作,疲劳,苦工vi.努力地工作vt.使劳累
examples: He never had much confidence in his judgement at the fag-end of the working day.
You’re not a fag, are you?
In the fag-end of its 12-year reign, Labour has lost even core supporters.
Interest will possibly pick up during the knockouts and the final at the fag end of the league.
When Shelley went for a fag break in the parking lot, she switched her phone back on for a few minutes.
